name: Fireshear
politics: Travellers, sailors and merchants pass through but rarely stay.
Local power is practical rather than noble.
culture: People value warmth, work and honesty.
Outsiders are watched but tolerated if useful.
Most locals know the dangers of the north.
rumours: Ships have seen strange lights out on the ice.
Miners found something old beneath the rock.
A caravan vanished north of town.
dmSecrets: A Harper contact may be watching the docks.
A faction is using the settlement as a quiet supply point.
Something old may have been dug up in the mines.
